name: Deer Filet A'tournedos Brennan
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, melt butter and sauté mushrooms.
2. Add flour and cook until slightly browned, stirring occasionally.
3. Stir in wine, mushroom juice, Worcestershire sauce, salt, and pepper.
4. Cook the mixture until thickened.
5. Season and grill the Deer filets to taste, rare or medium rare.
6. Cut the tomato into four slices and grill them as well.
7. Arrange a slice of grilled tomato on each filet and pour over the mushroom sauce.
Note: Use a large amount of charcoal (almost 2 layers) for rapid grilling. Adding whole hickory nuts or pecans, still in husks, to the grill will create an aromatic smoke without causing flames before the food is fully cooked.
